summary: Recovered project view validation and smart_construction_core upgrade, but stage gate still fails at project.dashboard.enter with explicit 403 permission denial on project.stage field access.

blocker.detail: project.dashboard.enter returns 403 PERMISSION_DENIED for project.project.stage_id read (requires Technical / Use Stages on Project group)

next_step: Create dedicated permission-operability recovery batch for project.dashboard.enter stage_id read path and rerun native business-fact stage gate
